projectDescription: A Spring Boot 3.4 / Java 21 microservices ecosystem featuring service discovery, JWT authentication, hexagonal architecture, event-driven messaging (RabbitMQ/Kafka), distributed tracing (Zipkin), and centralized log management (ELK stack), deployable via Docker Compose.
keyFeatures: Spring Boot 3.4 / Java 21 Maven multi-module project
Centralized configuration via Spring Cloud Config Server
JWT authentication with BCrypt (HS384) via dedicated Auth Service
Spring Cloud Gateway as OAuth2 Resource Server API gateway
Event-driven messaging with switchable RabbitMQ or Apache Kafka profiles
Distributed tracing with Micrometer + Brave + Zipkin
Centralized log aggregation with ELK stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana)
Full Docker Compose deployment with health checks and ordered startup
publicApiSurface: GET /api/inventory/products/{id} — Get product by ID (JWT required)
POST /api/inventory/products — Create product (JWT required, triggers async event)
ProductUseCase — Port interface for product CRUD operations
EventPublisherPort — Port interface for publishing product domain events
